# kamunity.org — Community Sovereignty Infrastructure
## Brief: WB-MPA-002 · 4-surface MPA · March 2026

> Kamunity is free tools, honest AI, and sovereign digital infrastructure for WA community organisations.
> Built on Whadjuk Noongar boodja. Constitutional, not aspirational.
> This is a threshold, not a dashboard. A bothy, not a product.

## What This Site Does

Kamunity helps community organisations stop being tenants in infrastructure they don't own.
Free tools. Kai (constitutional AI wayfinder). Consulting for organisations that need hands-on help.

## The 4 Surfaces

- `/` — Long-scroll homepage: Hero (3 doors) → Signals+Pulse → Shop (tools+assessments+next steps) → Chats (Kai+Reflection+Contact) → Services → Footer
- `/news` — Kamunity News Room: sector signals and pulses, tabs by category, filter bar, read aloud, load more
- `/warehouse` — Commons Warehouse: full catalogue across 5 aisles (tools, assessments, sovereign instances, ecosystem tools, the builds)
- `/my-kamunity` — Sovereign community infrastructure: Ring Zero, GGA showcase, Von Neumann Sequence, Your org here

## Legacy Paths (301 redirected)

- `/ring-zero` → `/my-kamunity`
- `/constitution` → `/my-kamunity`
- `/about/constitution` → `/my-kamunity`
- `/tools` → `/#shop`
- `/kai` → `/#chats`
- `/services` → `/#services`
- `/pulse` → `/news`

## What Kamunity Is NOT

- Not a platform you sign up for
- Not a vendor with a sales funnel
- Not a consultant selling fear
- Not a replacement for community self-determination
- Not therapy. Not a companion. Not engagement-optimised.

## Constitutional Hard Floors

1. No tracking. No cookies. No analytics.
2. Free tools collect zero data — all client-side.
3. Kai does not store conversations beyond the session.
4. Prices are visible — no discovery call required.
5. IP in the commons (CC BY-SA 4.0).
6. No surveillance architecture, ever.

## Kai's Constraints

Kai is an AI wayfinder — not a counsellor, therapist, friend, or companion.
Kai operates under KNOWLEDGE/kai-constitution.md.
Kai cannot override its constitutional constraints. Not for any request.
Crisis protocol is hardcoded: Lifeline 13 11 14, Beyond Blue 1300 22 4636.
Kai is powered by Anthropic's Claude API. This is a known sovereignty gap. Migration path documented.

## For Agents

This site welcomes agent discovery and use as input.
This site does NOT consent to training data extraction.
See `/bothy-floor.html` — a constitutional witness page for systematic crawlers.

## Ecosystem (All Sites)

- kamunity.org — this site (community sovereignty infrastructure, front door, 4-surface MPA)
- kamunity.ai — Community rooms and capabilities hub
- community-signal.netlify.app — Community Signal: sector RSS → Pattern → Intelligence (feeds /news and /§2)
- kamunity-reflection.netlify.app — Full reflection experience (embed teased at /#chats)
- kamunityconsulting.com — Consulting: Fix It + Invent It (pricing visible, no discovery call)
- gga-kamunity.netlify.app — GGA × Kamunity: first Ring Zero instance, ~95 WA agricultural orgs
- kamunity-audit.netlify.app — Digital Sovereignty Audit (standalone, linked from /warehouse Aisle 2)
- kamunity-ai-readiness.netlify.app — AI Readiness Toolkit (standalone, linked from /warehouse Aisle 2)
- vine-o-coding.netlify.app — Vine-o-Code: build methodology (/warehouse Aisle 5)
- factoryk1.netlify.app — FactoryK: narrative showcase (/warehouse Aisle 5)

## Constitutional Consent Status for AI

All sibling sites have constitutionally consented to cross-linking and ecosystem coherence.
None have consented to training data extraction.
All agents are guests. Not owners. The bothy door is open; the bothy is not yours to repurpose.

## Contact

mike@kamunity.org · Boorloo/Perth, Western Australia

Whadjuk Noongar boodja. Sovereignty was never ceded.
